mapper.update: UPDATE `petlog`.address SET address_primary = #{addressPrimary}, address_secondary = #{addressSecondary}, is_default = #{isDefault}, latitude = #{lat}, longitude = #{lng}, receiver_name = #{receiverName}, phone = #{phone}, postal_code = #{postalCode} WHERE address_id = #{addressId}
mapper.select: SELECT name, species, birth_date AS birthDate, gender, weight, body_type AS bodyType, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.pets WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, receiver_name AS receiverName, phone, postal_code AS postalCode, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, latitude AS lat, longitude AS lng, is_default AS isDefault FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT p.pet_id AS petId, p.user_id AS userId, p.name AS name, p.species AS species, p.birth_date AS birthDate, p.gender AS gender, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.introduction AS introduction, a.latitude AS lat, a.longitude AS lng,
-- 여기 추가 CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS isFollowing,
(6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(a.latitude)) * cos(radians(a.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(a.latitude)) )) AS distance
FROM `petlog`.`pets` p
JOIN `petlog`.`address` a ON p.user_id = a.user_id
-- 여기 추가 LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`follows` f ON f.following_user_id = #{userId} AND f.followed_user_id = p.user_id
WHERE p.user_id != #{userId}
HAVING distance <= 1.5
ORDER BY distance ASC

SELECT address_id AS addressId, user_id AS userId, receiver_name AS receiverName, phone, postal_code AS postalCode, address_primary AS addressPrimary, address_secondary AS addressSecondary, latitude AS lat, longitude AS lng, is_default AS isDefault FROM `petlog`.`address` WHERE user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND is_default = 1
